default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review initial SEO research, discuss content strategy, and set up collaboration processes for Teero's content marketing initiative with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Teero's authority score (20) is competitive with direct competitors (20-30), providing a solid foundation for SEO growth](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Content OS with 100+ potential assignments created, focusing on practice management and operational efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Teero to select 1-2 initial articles for calibration before GrowthX's holiday break](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Recent product updates (instant payments, instant book) and upcoming features (hygienist profiles, messaging) to be incorporated into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

## Topics

### SEO Status and Competitor Analysis

  - [Teero trails competitors in organic keywords and traffic, but has a competitive authority score of 20](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Dentistry industry keywords generally have lower difficulty, providing opportunities for Teero](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Mobile page speed flagged as potential issue, but Frank noted it's not as problematic as it appears](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Content Strategy and Topic Clusters

  - [7 topic clusters created, with "Practice Management and Operational Efficiency" as the largest](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [100+ potential assignments generated, covering \~3 months of content](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [AI-generated scores (-2 to 2) assess keyword relevance to Teero's brand](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Search volumes range from 30 to 1,000+ searches per month (directional data from SEMrush)](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

### Content Expansion and Prioritization

  - [Team open to exploring broader healthcare topics, balancing dentistry focus with authority-building](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Emphasis on HR-related content, potentially expanding to other healthcare sectors over time](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Recent product updates (instant payments, instant book) and upcoming features (hygienist profiles, messaging) to be incorporated into content](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

### Customer Pain Points and Unique Selling Propositions

  - [Key hygienist benefits: flexibility, W2 payments, instant pay](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Office-side topics: permanent placements without agency fees, insurance coverage for hygienists](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Additional topics: quality screening, minimum shift requirements, post-shift billing for offices](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Teero to review and select 1-2 initial articles for calibration by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [GrowthX to generate calibration articles for review before their holiday break](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Teero to provide access to Google Analytics and Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
  - [GrowthX to suggest blog categories for improved user navigation](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)
  - [Weekly meetings to continue for ongoing collaboration and idea sharing](https://fathom.video/share/4sy9BmK9qqZb6SYA-vaCGv4ra8jTF8v-?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
